title: Dimension Update
description: The mod adds new bosses and op wepoins
body:
The mod add 3 new dimensions, 2 new sets, the **_end/best_set_**
![Best Set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gQPCs2P3/images/9905feb4127f3f59e2f8e1a25c1f32f7e3dcc65f.png)
and the **_cosmo_set_**
![Cosmo Set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gQPCs2P3/images/d0f0766c12146dc4c5c752173153209cdd0009cf.png)
that are way more powerful than the vanilla sets, 2 new bosses that are "The King" and the "Cosmo King", "The king" can kill a warden and survive with a bunch of hearts, if you kill him you can have the "Staff of the King" that can spam special projectiles that you have to craft ;  the Cosmo King is a boss that have a lot of life, he can one shot you if you don't have a part of the cosmo set and if you kill him, he drop you the **_cosmo_sword_**![Cosmo Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gQPCs2P3/images/fb92613469cb9a38a3047e849f5bb50c8adbdad3.png)
that is a sword that as the cosmo_set, make you a god.

**_The official site_**
[https://free-5017254.webadorsite.com/](https://free-5017254.webadorsite.com/)

**_Slow Down your particles_**
